title: Warmly Caramelized Turkish Chickpeas Pilaf
description: A flavorful and herbal Turkish dish featuring caramelized chickpeas, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This ovo-vegetarian friendly pilaf is a great way to enjoy the taste of spring in a bowl.
instructions: Rinse the chickpeas and set them aside to drain.
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the saucepan and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the saucepan and cook for an additional minute.
Add the paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the chickpeas to the saucepan and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until they are lightly browned.
Add the basmati rice to the saucepan and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in the spice mixture.
Add the vegetable broth to the saucepan and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
